description: Drive THIS orbit with typed MCP tools (mcp__dashboard__*) instead of ad-hoc curl: search/list/find/create/start/stop the other PARA agent sessions, send-and-wait for replies, read transcripts, answer a child's AskUserQuestion / permission prompts by injecting keystrokes into its tmux pane, plus PARA discovery and Telegram notify. The orchestrator's delegate-and-collect loop. Scoped to the Global agent.
